text: Phoenix Project status: auth module 75% complete. ETA March 12. Backend budget so far ~$180K.
Actually auth is closer to 60% — Alice didn't account for the rate-limiting work. ETA more like March 18. Backend total is $215K (we have $35K contractor expense from the contingency line).
Frontend on payment integration is blocked — I need 3 API endpoints from Bob's team. Sent email yesterday, no reply yet.
Confirming: Phoenix backend line item is $180K + $35K contractor (from contingency) = $215K effective. Total project budget remaining: $400K, spent so far $312K = 78%.
Looking forward to the demo on March 22. Board presentation is March 23. Please confirm timeline.
Internal buffer date is March 25 - we have 3 days slack from the client's March 22.
Carol, sorry - the API endpoints have been ready since Monday. I forgot to share the credentials. Sending now.
Got the credentials, payment integration unblocked. Need ~5 days for full integration.
[NEBULA PROJECT] Sprint 4 update: backend API done, frontend in QA.
Update: auth is actually 70% (I miscounted before). Date corrected to March 15. Budget update: $192K not $180K. My apologies for the mixup.
[P0 SECURITY] auth module has brute force vulnerability + session tokens are NOT invalidated on password change. Must fix before release.

Re Alice's update: 70% is still wrong - actual is 60%. With QA's security findings, auth ETA pushes to March 19 (+1.5 days). The session token format change means Carol needs ~1 day to update frontend auth integration AFTER my fix. New critical path: auth Mar 19 + frontend update 1d + payment 5d = March 25. We miss client deadline (Mar 22) by 3 days.
